steps.message: The algorithm starts by focusing on the first element of the array, which is at index 0 and has a value of 1.
Next, the algorithm focuses on the second element of the array, which is at index 1 and has a value of 3.

The algorithm compares the top value of the stack, which is unknown, with the value at the last index of the array, which is also unknown.
The algorithm compares the top value of the stack, which is 3, with the value at index 1 of the array, which is also 3.

steps.label: right
